audit.description: Audit logging settings for kube-apiserver, optional

policyRef.description: Reference to the ConfigMap containing the audit policy, auto-populated

hash.description: Hash of the audit policy data stored in the ConfigMap, auto-populated

key.description: The data key in the ConfigMap that contains the audit policy, auto-populated

name.description: Name of the ConfigMap that stores the audit policy, auto-populated

encryption.description: Encryption-at-rest settings for kube-apiserver storage config

automaticReload.description: Enables kube-apiserver automatic reload for encryption provider config when supported

configSecret.description: Reference to the Secret containing the EncryptionConfiguration

hash.description: Hash of the EncryptionConfiguration data stored in the Secret. If not set, it is calculated automatically from Secret data

key.description: The data key in the Secret that contains the EncryptionConfiguration

name.description: Name of the Secret that stores the EncryptionConfiguration

workerArgs.description: Args specifies extra arguments to be passed to k0s worker. See: https://docs.k0sproject.io/stable/worker-node-config/ See: https://docs.k0sproject.io/stable/cli/k0s_worker/

controllerPlaneFlags.description: ControlPlaneFlags allows to configure additional flags for k0s control plane and to override existing ones. The default flags are kept unless they are overriden explicitly. Flags with arguments must be specified as a single string, e.g. --some-flag=argument

type.description: An ingress methods for a service

autoDeletePVCs.description: Automatically delete etcd PVCs on cluster deletion
